name: liquid-lab-hero-with-finder
description: Composite hero: full-bleed background slider with a positioned product-finder overlay. Reuses the snippet shipped with #12 liquid-lab-product-finder via {% render 'liquid-lab-product-finder' %} — zero code duplication for the finder UI. Two block types in one section: slide (max 10) and filter (max 6). The slider supports auto-rotate, prev/next arrows, dot indicators, swipe on mobile, keyboard nav (Left/Right when focused), and pause-on-hover/focus. Two transition modes (slide / fade). Per-slide overlay override on top of a section default (color + opacity + style: solid / gradient-bottom / gradient-radial). Finder positions: right (default), left, center-overlay; mobile always stacks below the slider. Full UI Element Settings Standard for the finder card/field/submit (mirrors #12 with finder_* prefix). Six finder-driver settings are unprefixed (cta_hover_effect, fields_layout, card_align, entrance_animation, entrance_type, submit_full_width) because the snippet auto-reads them from card_settings.settings. LCP optimization: first slide eager + fetchpriority high when section.index <= 2. Slider ARIA: region/slideshow roledescription, aria-current on active slide, aria-hidden + inert on inactive, role=tab on dots. Touch-target 44px min on arrows, dots, selects, submit. focus-visible rings on all interactive elements. Shopify.designMode integration: autoplay disabled, shopify:block:select jumps to that slide. prefers-reduced-motion respected (autoplay disabled, animations neutralized). Three Dark/Warm/Bold presets seeded with realistic 3 slides + 3 filter blocks each.
notes: Reuses snippet from #12 liquid-lab-product-finder. Sprint 2 of hero+finder series.
